case_title: H2O PLUS, LLC. VS. ANN GLOBAL ENTERPRISE, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,589.00 FILED BY H2O PLUS, LLC. AS TO DEFENDANT ANN GLOBAL ENTERPRISE, INC. AKA ANN GLOBAL, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-01-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE $189.00) SERVED MAR-22-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ANN GLOBAL ENTERPRISE, INC. AKA ANN GLOBAL, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-01-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-01-2018 BY PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFF H20 PLUS, LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY LAURA HORN, SENIOR MGR HR. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 189.50 SERVED MAR-22-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ANN GLOBAL ENTERPRISE, INC. AKA ANN GLOBAL, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF H2O PLUS, LLC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-01-2018 - JUDGMENT.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY H2O PLUS, LLC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF H2O PLUS, LLC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANN GLOBAL ENTERPRISE, INC. AKA ANN GLOBAL, INC. $3,589.00 PRINCIPAL, $239.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,828.50, DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF ESTABLISHED THAT DEFENDANT DID NOT COMPLY WITH THE LAW CONCERNING RETENTION AND RETURN OF SECURITY DEPOSITS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
